tasks.title: Backend: fix SKA reward state — empty on startup and not cleared on SKA-free blocks
tasks.description:
**Bug A — Empty on startup:** After binary restart, the Vote SKA Reward subsection is empty on first page load. Data only appears after the first SKA-containing block is mined.

**Bug B — Stale data after SKA-free blocks:** Once SKA reward data appears, it is never cleared when subsequent SKA-free blocks arrive. Previous figures remain frozen indefinitely.

**Acceptance signal:** (a) First page load after restart shows correct SKA reward data or placeholder — without waiting for a new block. (b) A SKA-free block causes the backend to provide cleared/empty SKA reward state.
